steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Teams Agent with Data" option in the dropdown menu of the "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" prompt within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Azure AI Search" dropdown option in the "Teams Agent with Data" pop-up menu within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the programming language selection dropdown within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Default folder" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dropdown at the top of the VS Code application to set the workspace directory to "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
